mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ForumDAO.selectForumDvclasList 설명 : 토론분반목록조회 */ WITH BASE AS ( SELECT PROF_ID , SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT SBJCT.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO AS DVCLAS_NO , SBJCT.SBJCT_ID AS DVCLS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SBJCT_ADM ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ID AND SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' AND SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID = (SELECT PROF_ID FROM BASE) WHERE SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = (SELECT SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM BASE) ORDER BY SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : Forum2DAO.selectForum 설명 : 토론정보조회(1건) */ SELECT A.DSCS_ID , A.DSCS_GRP_ID , G.DSCS_GRPNM , A.DSCS_GBNCD , A.DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , A.EVL_SCR_TYCD , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_CTS , A.DSCS_SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM , A.DVCLS_NO , A.LRN_GRP_ID , A.DELYN , A.OATCL_INQYN , A.OKNOK_STNGYN , A.OKNOKRT_OYN , A.OKNOK_MODYN , A.MLT_OPNN_REGYN , A.OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , A.CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , A.MRK_OYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.SBJCT_ID , A.BYTEAM_DSCS_USEYN /* 게시글 수 조회 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS forumAtclCnt /* 댓글 수 조회 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT B WHERE B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DSCS_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT C.DSCS_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL C WHERE C.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' )) AS forumCmntCnt /* 찬성 수 조회 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.OKNOK_GBNCD = 'OK' AND B.ATCL_LV = 0) AS forumAtclPorsCnt /* 반대 수 조회 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.OKNOK_GBNCD = 'NOTOK' AND B.ATCL_LV = 0) AS forumAtclConsCnt /* 전체 수강생 수 조회 */ , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) AS forumUserTotalCnt /* 참여 인원 수 조회 (글 또는 댓글 작성자) */ , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND USER_ID = AA.USER_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE USER_ID = AA.USER_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND DSCS_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT DSCS_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) ) ) ) AS forumJoinUserCnt FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_GRP G ON A.DSCS_GRP_ID = G.DSCS_GRP_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : Forum2DAO.insertForum 설명 : 토론등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS ( DSCS_ID , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_NO , LRN_GRP_ID , DELYN , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOK_STNGYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_RFLTRT , MRK_OYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , SBJCT_ID , BYTEAM_DSCS_USEYN , UP_DSCS_ID , TEAM_ID ) VALUES ( #{dscsId} , #{dscsGrpId} , '' , #{dscsUnitTycd} , #{evlScrTycd} , #{dscsTtl} , #{dscsCts} , #{dscsSdttm} , #{dscsEdttm} , #{dvclsNo} , #{lrnGrpId} , NVL(#{delyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oatclInqyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokStngyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokrtOyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokModyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mltOpnnRegyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{oknokRgtrOyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{cmntRspnsReqyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mrkRfltyn}, 'N') , NVL(#{mrkRfltrt}, 0) , NVL(#{mrkOyn}, 'N') , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , FN_DTTM() , #{sbjctId} , NVL(#{byteamDscsUseyn}, 'N') , #{upDscsId} , #{teamId} )

/* SQL ID : ForumDAO.copyForum 설명 : 기존토론을 신규 토론으로 복사 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS ( DSCS_ID , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_NO , LRN_GRP_ID , DELYN , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_RFLTRT , MRK_OYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , SBJCT_ID , BYTEAM_DSCS_USEYN ) SELECT #{dscsId} , DSCS_GRP_ID , DSCS_GBNCD , DSCS_UNIT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , DSCS_TTL , DSCS_CTS , DSCS_SDTTM , DSCS_EDTTM , DVCLS_NO , LRN_GRP_ID , 'N' , OATCL_INQYN , OKNOKRT_OYN , OKNOK_MODYN , MLT_OPNN_REGYN , OKNOK_RGTR_OYN , CMNT_RSPNS_REQYN , MRK_RFLTYN , NVL(MRK_RFLTRT, 0) , MRK_OYN , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , FN_DTTM() , #{sbjctId} , NVL(#{byteamDscsUseyn}, 'N') FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = #{copydscsId}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ForumDAO.deleteForum 설명 : 토론 삭제(논리삭제) */ UPDATE TB_LMS_DSCS SET DELYN = 'Y' , MDFR_ID = NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId}

/* SQL ID : Forum2DAO.updateChildForumDelYn 설명 : 팀토론 자식 토론 논리 삭제 (UP_DSCS_ID 기준) */ UPDATE TB_LMS_DSCS SET DELYN = 'Y' , MDFR_ID = NVL(#{mdfrId}, #{rgtrId}) , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE UP_DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND DELYN = 'N'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ForumDAO.selectTeamDscsList 설명 : 팀토론현황정보조회 */ SELECT A.DSCS_ID , A.UP_DSCS_ID , A.TEAM_ID , T.TEAMNM , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_CTS , A.TEAM_DSCS_OYN /* 1. 팀장명: LDRYN='Y'인 사용자 1명의 이름만 조회 */ , (SELECT MAX(U.USERNM) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M1 JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON M1.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE M1.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID AND M1.LDRYN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS LEADER_NM /* 2. 팀원 수: 팀장(Y)을 제외한 순수 팀원(N)의 총 인원수 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M2 WHERE M2.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID AND M2.LDRYN = 'N') AS TEAM_MBR_CNT /* 3. 참여글 수: 해당 팀 구성원들의 게시글 합계 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AT1 WHERE AT1.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND AT1.DELYN = 'N' AND AT1.USER_ID IN (SELECT M3.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M3 WHERE M3.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID)) AS ATCL_CNT /* 4. 댓글 수: 해당 팀 구성원들의 댓글 합계 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT CM1 WHERE CM1.DELYN = 'N' AND CM1.USER_ID IN (SELECT M4.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M4 WHERE M4.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AT2 WHERE AT2.DSCS_ATCL_ID = CM1.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND AT2.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID)) AS CMNT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM T ON A.TEAM_ID = T.TEAM_ID WHERE A.UP_DSCS_ID = #{upDscsId} ORDER BY T.REG_DTTM ASC

/* SQL ID : Forum2DAO.selectForumLrnGrpTeamList 설명 : 학습그룹 팀 목록 조회 (팀 토론 부주제 설정용) - 학습그룹의 전체 팀 조회 (미저장 팀 포함) - upDscsId 존재 시 기존 부주제값 LEFT JOIN */ SELECT T.TEAM_ID AS teamId , T.TEAMNM AS teamnm , NVL((SELECT U.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER U JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M ON U.USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE M.LDRYN = 'Y' AND M.TEAM_ID = T.TEAM_ID), '-') AS leaderNm , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M2 WHERE M2.TEAM_ID = T.TEAM_ID) AS teamMbrCnt , D.DSCS_TTL AS dscsTtl , D.DSCS_CTS AS dscsCts , D.DSCS_ID AS dscsId FROM TB_LMS_TEAM T LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS D ON D.TEAM_ID = T.TEAM_ID AND D.UP_DSCS_ID = #{upDscsId} AND D.DELYN = 'N' WHERE T.LRN_GRP_ID = #{lrnGrpId} ORDER BY T.REG_DTTM ASC
/* 토론 성적 분포 현황 ForumDAO.selectScoreChart */ SELECT MIN(SCR) AS minScore , MAX(SCR) AS maxScore , ROUND(AVG(SCR)) AS avgScore FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} GROUP BY DSCS_ID
/* 성적반영비율 토론 리스트 ForumDAO.getScoreRatio */ SELECT DSCS_ID AS dscsId FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE 1 = 1 AND DELYN = 'N' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
